message:
feat(web): add stagger animations and touch polish to Jargon component

- Add stagger animations for tooltip content reveal
- Add stagger animations for mobile sheet content
- Add chip stagger for related terms pills
- Add active:scale-[0.98] tap feedback on trigger
- Add hover drop-shadow glow effect
- Animate arrow on "View full entry" link

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.3.2","title":"CLI: session status / wait until complete","description":"Implement `brenner session status`.

Requirements:
- show per-role response state (pending/received)
- show pending acks (if any)
- `--watch` polls until complete (with backoff)
- exit code: 0 when complete, nonzero when timed out / error

 {"id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.5","title":"CLI: single-binary build + release workflow","description":"# Goal
Ship `brenner` as a **self-contained executable** via `bun build --compile` and publish deterministic release artifacts that can be installed by `install.sh` / `install.ps1`.

# Why this matters
The operator bootstrap story (see `brenner_bot-5so.11.2`) depends on this:
- installers need **stable asset names**
- installers need **checksums** to verify downloads
- CI needs to continuously validate the end-to-end install path

# Deliverables (what a release must contain)
1. **Binaries** for the supported platform matrix (see below).
2. **Checksums** (SHA256) for every binary.
3. A **GitHub Actions release workflow** that builds on tag pushes and uploads assets + checksums.
4. A documented mapping from (OS, arch) → (release asset name) used by the installer + `brenner doctor`.

# Target platform matrix (v0)
- Linux x64 (use `bun-linux-x64-baseline` unless we have a reason not to; avoids illegal instruction on older CPUs)
- macOS arm64
- macOS x64
- Windows x64

(We can add musl + linux-arm64 later if needed.)

# Reference implementations (patterns to emulate)
- `Dicklesworthstone/cass_memory_system` (cm): Bun compile release + `.sha256` assets
- `Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search` (cass): multi-OS dist + installer e2e tests
- `Dicklesworthstone/ntm`: release hygiene (checksums/signing) — signing is optional for v0

# Acceptance criteria
- A tag release produces binaries + SHA256 checksums as GitHub release assets.
- The installer can download the correct asset by version and verify it.
- `brenner --version` reports a stable semver (see `brenner_bot-5so.11.3.1`).
","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:13.528547864-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T13:18:02.122394206-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T13:18:02.122394206-05:00","close_reason":"All P1/P2 children complete: build script, release workflow, artifact matrix, checksums. Only P3 docs task remains.","labels":["build","cli"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:26:13.529429794-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-5so.5.5","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-29T22:37:09.754759655-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
